questions.q: In which Indian city is the Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) located?
questions.explanation: FTII is located in Pune, Maharashtra, on the former Prabhat Studios campus.

questions.q: In which year was the Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) founded?
questions.explanation: FTII was founded in 1960, originally as the Film Institute of India.

questions.q: The FTII campus in Pune was established on the grounds of which former film studio?
questions.explanation: FTII occupies the former Prabhat Studios campus in Pune.

questions.q: Under which government ministry does the Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) primarily function?
questions.explanation: FTII operates under the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting, Government of India.

questions.q: Which acclaimed Malayalam director, known for films like Swayamvaram and Elippathayam, is an alumnus of FTII Pune?
questions.explanation: Adoor Gopalakrishnan, a pioneer of Malayalam parallel cinema, graduated from FTII Pune.

questions.q: Which actress, later a politician and producer, studied acting at FTII Pune before her career in Hindi and Bengali cinema?
questions.explanation: Jaya Bachchan (née Bhaduri) trained as an actor at FTII Pune and won the institute's gold medal.

questions.q: Which actor, famous for Sparsh, Masoom and a long art-cinema career, is a graduate of FTII Pune's acting course?
questions.explanation: Naseeruddin Shah is among FTII Pune's most celebrated acting alumni.

questions.q: Which actress, known for Ankur and Arth, graduated from FTII Pune and won multiple National Film Awards?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi, a leading figure of parallel cinema, is an FTII Pune alumna.

questions.q: FTII Pune is best known for being a premier institute teaching which field?
questions.explanation: FTII Pune is India's premier government institute for film and television education.

questions.q: The actor Om Puri, known for Aakrosh and Ardh Satya, was an alumnus of which film school?
options: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute
questions.explanation: Om Puri trained as an actor at FTII Pune before his distinguished film career.

questions.q: Which experimental director, known for Uski Roti and Duvidha, was both a student and influential teacher associated with FTII Pune?
questions.explanation: Mani Kaul, a key figure of Indian avant-garde cinema, was an FTII Pune alumnus and later taught there.

questions.q: Which FTII Pune alumnus directed the Kannada classic Ghatashraddha and won several National Film Awards?
questions.explanation: Girish Kasaravalli, a leading Kannada parallel-cinema director, graduated from FTII Pune and directed Ghatashraddha (1977).

questions.q: Which celebrated FTII-trained director was a contemporary of Mani Kaul, known for the film Maya Darpan?
questions.explanation: Kumar Shahani, who directed Maya Darpan (1972), studied at FTII Pune alongside Mani Kaul.

questions.q: What was the original name of the Film and Television Institute of India when it was set up in 1960?
questions.explanation: It was founded as the Film Institute of India in 1960 and renamed FTII in 1971 when the television wing was added.

questions.q: Which gold-medallist FTII Pune cinematographer shot the landmark parallel-cinema film Bhuvan Shome and several of Mani Kaul's films?
questions.explanation: K. K. Mahajan, a 1966 FTII cinematography gold medallist, shot Bhuvan Shome and Mani Kaul's Uski Roti.

questions.q: The Prabhat Studios, on whose grounds FTII Pune stands, was co-founded by which pioneering filmmaker?
questions.explanation: V. Shantaram was a co-founder of Prabhat Film Company, whose Pune studio later became the FTII campus.

questions.q: Which FTII Pune alumnus became a renowned cinematographer-director and made the Malayalam film Piravi?
questions.explanation: Shaji N. Karun, an FTII graduate, directed the award-winning Malayalam film Piravi (1989).

questions.q: In 2015, FTII Pune students staged a prolonged protest primarily over the appointment of which figure as the institute's chairman?
questions.explanation: The 2015 FTII strike was triggered by the appointment of actor Gajendra Chauhan as chairman of the institute's governing council.

questions.q: Which acclaimed sound designer and FTII alumnus won an Academy Award for sound mixing on Slumdog Millionaire?
questions.explanation: Resul Pookutty, an FTII Pune graduate, won an Academy Award for sound mixing on Slumdog Millionaire.

questions.q: Which FTII-trained director made the Hindi film Albert Pinto Ko Gussa Kyoon Aata Hai and the TV series Nukkad?
questions.explanation: Saeed Akhtar Mirza, an FTII alumnus, directed Albert Pinto Ko Gussa Kyoon Aata Hai and co-created Nukkad.

questions.q: Which veteran actor and psychiatrist, known for Marathi films such as Jait Re Jait and Sinhasan, served as director of FTII Pune?
questions.explanation: Mohan Agashe, an actor and psychiatrist, served as Director of FTII Pune from 1997 to 2002.

questions.q: Which influential teacher served as FTII Pune's Professor of Film Appreciation and profoundly shaped generations of its students?
questions.explanation: Satish Bahadur was Professor of Film Appreciation at FTII Pune from 1963 to 1983 and shaped many filmmakers.

questions.q: The legendary Bengali filmmaker Ritwik Ghatak served at FTII Pune in the 1960s in which capacity?
questions.explanation: Ritwik Ghatak taught at FTII Pune as vice-principal, deeply influencing students like Mani Kaul and Kumar Shahani.

questions.q: Which national film body, preserving India's film heritage, is located in Pune near FTII?
questions.explanation: The National Film Archive of India (NFAI) is located in Pune, near FTII, preserving India's film heritage.

questions.q: Which actor, who later starred in Mirch Masala and Mandi, won the gold medal for acting at FTII Pune?
questions.explanation: Naseeruddin Shah won the gold medal for acting at FTII Pune and later starred in Mandi and Mirch Masala.

questions.q: Which FTII alumnus directed the 1973 film Duvidha, the Rajasthani folk tale later remade in Hindi cinema as Paheli?
questions.explanation: Mani Kaul directed Duvidha (1973), the Rajasthani folk tale later remade as Paheli.

questions.q: Which acclaimed editor, an FTII Pune graduate associated with parallel cinema, won four National Film Awards for editing films like Parinda and Sardar?
questions.explanation: Renu Saluja, a 1976 FTII editing graduate, won four National Awards for editing, including Parinda and Sardar.

questions.q: The Television Training wing of FTII, earlier functioning in New Delhi, shifted to which city in 1974?
questions.explanation: The Television Training wing, earlier based in New Delhi, shifted to Pune in 1974, consolidating FTII's campus there.

questions.q: Which veteran Bollywood actor was appointed chairman of FTII's governing council in October 2017, succeeding Gajendra Chauhan?
questions.explanation: Actor Anupam Kher was appointed chairman of the FTII governing council in October 2017, succeeding Gajendra Chauhan.

questions.q: FTII Pune's campus preserves the legacy of Prabhat, including a banyan tree (the 'Wisdom Tree') that is celebrated as which kind of place?
options: A gathering and discussion spot for students
questions.explanation: The famed 'Wisdom Tree' banyan on the FTII campus is a celebrated gathering and discussion spot for students.
